title: Extracting archives should not lead to zip slip vulnerabilities
description: Ensure that when extracting archive files (such as ZIP), the extraction process does not allow files to be written outside the intended target directory, preventing zip slip vulnerabilities.
recommendation: Validate and sanitize file paths when extracting archives. Do not allow archive entries to write files outside the intended extraction directory.
impact: Attackers may exploit zip slip vulnerabilities to overwrite critical files or execute arbitrary code on the system.

checks.message: Validate and sanitize file paths when extracting archives. Do not allow archive entries to write files outside the intended extraction directory.
